content.speakerText: Hey there! What can I get you today?
expectedAnswers: Hello! Could I get two pounds of potatoes, please?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了购买需求
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合口语习惯，语气是否自然

content.speakerText: Good morning! Anything special you're looking for?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好！有什么特别想买的吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi! I'd like some fresh basil and garlic.
Yes, I need oranges and lemons, please.
Morning! Could I get a kilo of tomatoes and a few onions?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了摊主的询问并表达需求
语言准确性：使用了正确的冠词、量词和动词搭配
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达如 'Could I get...' 或 'Got any...'，语气友好
